focal_document_element_description: The ability to shift back and forth between two or more activities or sources of information.
comments: Cognitive multitasking is a basic ability, not a professional competency. Not a gap for WIDAI.

strength_justification.methodology: No computational scoring — element determined out of WIDAI scope during semantic analysis
